title: Warm Earthy Spanish Octopus Pulpo A La Gallega
description: A traditional Spanish dish featuring tender octopus in a rich and creamy sauce, perfect for a romantic dinner
instructions: Rinse the octopus under cold water, then cut it into small pieces and set aside
Heat the olive oil in a large saucepan over medium heat
Add the chopped onion and cook until it is translucent and starting to caramelize
Add the minced garlic and cook for an additional minute, stirring constantly
Stir in the paprika and cook for 1 minute
Add the golden caster sugar, candy cap mushrooms, and cooked octopus to the saucepan
Pour in the heavy cream and bring the mixture to a simmer
Reduce the heat to low and let the sauce simmer for 10 minutes, stirring occasionally
Season the sauce with salt and black pepper to taste
Serve the pulpo a la gallega hot, garnished with chopped fresh parsley if desired
